ddls:
CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the journal */,
  "issn_print" TEXT /* ISSN (Print) number of the journal */,
  "issn_online" TEXT /* ISSN (Online) number of the journal */,
  "open_select" INTEGER /* Indicates if optional gold OA is available */,
  "gold_oa_content_licence" TEXT /* Content license for gold OA articles */,
  "gold_oa_alternative_licence" TEXT /* Alternative content license for gold OA articles */,
  "gold_oa_apc" TEXT /* Article processing charge (APC) for gold OA articles */,
  "discipline" TEXT /* Discipline of the journal */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the journal */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the journal was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journal_types" (
  "journal_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal type */,
  "journal_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the journal type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journal_type_mapping" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the journal */,
  "journal_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the journal type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id", "journal_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "green_oa_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each green OA policy */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the journal */,
  "archiving_type" TEXT /* Type of archiving (e.g., personal/departmental website, social scientific network) */,
  "embargo_period" INTEGER /* Embargo period in months */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_green_oa_policies_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gold_oa_terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gold OA term */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the journal */,
  "content_licence" TEXT /* Content license for gold OA articles */,
  "alternative_licence" TEXT /* Alternative content license for gold OA articles */,
  "apc" TEXT /* Article processing charge (APC) for gold OA articles */,
  "apc_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the APC */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gold_oa_terms_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the journal */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the article (e.g., submitted, in review, published) */,
  "open_access_type" TEXT /* Type of open access (e.g., gold, green, hybrid) */,
  "oa_license" TEXT /* OA license used for the article */,
  "oa_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the OA status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the author */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID ID of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_authors" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author */,
  "author_role" TEXT /* Role of the author (e.g., primary, co-author) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., editor, reviewer, author, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., accepted, rejected, revised) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation provided by the reviewer (e.g., major revision, minor revision) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_reviews_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_versions_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_metrics" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations for the article */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of downloads for the article */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)
